ov_title: ARIHANT CITY DOWNTOWN - 32 ACRE MEGA TOWNSHIP
ov_desc: Experience the pinnacle of high-rise living at Arihant City Downtown, a massive 32-acre mega township on the Kalyan-Bhiwandi Bypass. With 20 years of excellence and 1200+ happy families, we now launch the D3 Signature Tower - a 26-storey masterpiece offering premium 1 & 2 BHK balcony homes with 10ft. ceiling heights and designer lobbies.
story_desc: Arihant Group brings two decades of expertise, having delivered over 12 Lacs Sq.Ft of premium space. Arihant City Downtown is our flagship 32-acre development. Phase I (9 Towers) and Phase II (6+ Towers) are already sold out with OC received, making it a trusted landmark. Our new D3 Signature Tower sets a new benchmark with king-size balconies and dedicated amenities floors.
peace_title: D3 SIGNATURE TOWER - THE PINNACLE OF LUXURY
peace_desc: Standing tall at 26 storeys, the D3 Signature Tower is a ring road touch property designed for the elite. Each home features a 10ft. ceiling height, 4 high-speed lifts, and a designer entrance lobby. Wake up to fresh air and open views from your king-size balcony, situated in the heart of a vibrant community near the Sai Baba Temple.
am_desc: Arihant City Downtown offers a dedicated amenities floor including a high-end Gym, Community Hall, and Indoor Games Area. Enjoy the luxurious Clubhouse with a Swimming Pool, Sand Kids Play Area, and beautifully landscaped gardens.
conn_title: STRATEGIC CONNECTIVITY - HUB OF FUTURE GROWTH
conn_desc: Located just 1 min from the Mumbai-Nashik Expressway and 2 mins from the upcoming Temghar Metro Station (Line 5), Arihant City Downtown is perfectly positioned. It sits at the gateway of the 701km Samruddhi Mahamarg, connecting you to Thane, Kalyan, and Mumbai in minutes.
comf_desc: Live just 20 mins away from Majiwada (Thane), Kalyan Station, and Airoli. With easy access to top schools like Presidency and Poddar, and hospitals like Fortis and Jupiter, everything your family needs is within reach.
fp_desc: Explore our meticulously crafted floor plans for the D3 Signature Tower. Choose from spacious 1 BHK (up to 614 sq.ft total) and 2 BHK (766 sq.ft total) homes, or create your dream space with our 1080 sq.ft Jodi Flats.
gal_desc: View the actual lifestyle at Arihant City Downtown. From the grand entrance to the high-rise views, experience why 1200+ families have already made this their home.
why_title: WHY ARIHANT CITY DOWNTOWN IS THE BEST INVESTMENT?
why_desc: Arihant City Downtown is not just a home; it's a future-proof investment. With the upcoming Metro Line 5, the ring road connectivity, and the proximity to the Samruddhi Mahamarg, property values in this 32-acre township are set to soar. Backed by Arihant Group's 20-year legacy and proven track record of delivering 12+ Lacs Sq.Ft, you are choosing security, quality, and luxury. Our OC-received phases stand as testimony to our commitment.
